dual_lockfile_conflict.detection: Presence of both package-lock.json and pnpm-lock.yaml in the root directory
dual_lockfile_conflict.impact: Vercel auto-detection defaults to pnpm, leading to ERR_PNPM_OUTDATED_LOCKFILE if pnpm is stale or not fully configured
dual_lockfile_conflict.resolution: Enforce single package manager: delete package-lock.json and configure packages list ['.'] in pnpm-workspace.yaml if working with a single root repository

edge_function_size_limit.detection: NOW_SANDBOX_WORKER_MAX_MIDDLEWARE_SIZE error on Vercel Hobby tier (exceeding 1MB)
edge_function_size_limit.impact: Prisma client usage in Next.js App Router API routes defaults to Edge runtime compilation when undefined
edge_function_size_limit.resolution: Explicitly define 'export const runtime = "nodejs"' for all routes importing Prisma Client to force execution on Serverless Node.js runtime

navbar_routing_fix.detection: Anchor links (#section) failing to resolve properly from subpages in a hub-and-spoke Next.js architecture.
navbar_routing_fix.impact: User clicks a navbar link on a subpage expecting to go to the section but stays on the subpage with an invalid hash.
navbar_routing_fix.resolution: Use absolute standalone routes (e.g., /products) for main navigation links and only apply preventDefault() and scrollIntoView() for the homepage anchor (e.g., /#beranda) when the user is already on the homepage.

21st_sdk_integration.detection: Requirement to add intelligent agent chat interface.
21st_sdk_integration.impact: Improves user engagement with AI capabilities.
21st_sdk_integration.resolution: Integrate @21st-sdk/nextjs and @ai-sdk/react. Route /chat to <AgentChat />. Secure via API_KEY_21ST environment variable handled by getTokenHandler at /api/an-token.
